original_image_tags: A faded, grainy, off-white document page. Two dark, circular punch holes are visible at the top. The majority of the page contains very faint, blurred text that is largely illegible, appearing as a ghosted or carbon-copy impression. At the bottom are two circular ink stamps and a typed date. The page shows signs of age, with mottling and texture throughout.

elements.description: One circular 'RECEIVED' stamp with text '11 JAN 1949' and 'REGISTERED UNIT MATS', surrounded by a clock-like dial with numbers. One smaller circular stamp with text 'JAN 1 3 1949' and numbers 1-12. Faint, reversed typed text visible through the paper, including a list of numbers and words like 'AIR TRANSPORT COMMAND'.

judge.reason: Description A describes two circular stamps and a typed date as faint/illegible, while Description B provides highly specific, contradictory verbatim text and details for the stamps, constituting a direct factual inconsistency on visual content.
